negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_289
prompt: The video opens in a well-lit judo dojo, characterized by large windows that allow natural light to enter. The walls are a soft beige, decorated with framed pictures and papers pinned to boards. Two men wearing white gis sit side-by-side with their backs leaning against the wall in the background. In the foreground, two individuals are engaged in a judo practice session. The person on the left, dressed in a blue gi with a black belt, is actively grappling with the person on the right, who wears a white gi with a black belt. The individual in blue grips the arm of the person in white, initiating a throw. The person in white responds by lifting their right leg, preparing for a counter-throw. The sequence continues with the individual in blue getting lifted off the ground, going over the person in white. This results in both participants landing on the mat with their backs towards the floor while still holding onto each other's arm sleeves. The video concludes with the two men in white gis no longer visible in the background.
